rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that uses a simple formula and practical examples to make the process easy to follow. Language is mostly plain and reader-friendly, with only a little unavoidable tax jargon. It is slightly longer than necessary, and a few points are somewhat simplified because property-tax systems vary by place.
